LED control, system loop functions, console and error handling, JavaScript execution, and build tools for JerryScript on mbed.

## Folders
- **[js](js/README.md)**: LED control and system loop functions with status messaging.
- **[source](source/README.md)**: Implements console and error handling, JavaScript execution, and LED control for JerryScript on mbed.

## Files
- **[Makefile.mbed](Makefile.mbed.md)**: Makefile for building and flashing JerryScript on various mbed targets like k64f and stm32f4.
- **[module.json](module.json.md)**: Configuration file for the JerryScript module in mbed, specifying version, dependencies, and license.
- **[readme.md](readme.md.md)**: Instructions for building and running JerryScript on mbed-supported boards using Yotta and GCC 5.2.1.
